title: Chrisboard operating board
statusReason: Private Cloudflare deployment is live; current goal is turning the proof into a minimal, useful WorkNode board without adding control-plane behavior.
nextAction: Replace mock UI/data with a minimal static WorkNode read model and redeploy.

approvalGates.label: Writable control plane
approvalGates.requiredBefore: Any dispatch, resume, pause, status write, external write, or gateway/runtime mutation

residueState.summary: No public Pages exposure; Access protects custom and pages.dev domains

sourceStates.details: GitHub Pages workflow and CNAME were removed; GitHub Pages API returns 404.
No mutation or control-plane behavior is in v1 scope.

realSource.redaction: Only deployment and access status are represented; no tokens or secrets are rendered.

title: Minimal board UI
childScope: Remove explanatory chrome, keep status columns as structure, and move evidence/source detail behind selection.
statusReason: The UI contract is now clear: status categories are fine as columns, but workflow legends/subtitles are noise.
nextAction: Implement the Trello-like board surface and verify it behind Access.

approvalGates.label: Writable control plane
approvalGates.requiredBefore: Any task write or live executor action

sourceStates.details: Columns/cards/counts/icons are allowed; workflow legends and AI-ish subtitles are not.

title: WorkNode JSON read model
childScope: Load board data from a static JSON read model instead of hardcoded mock cards.
statusReason: This item is ready to verify once the app renders data/worknodes.json and the read-only verifier checks the JSON source.
nextAction: Run build, tests, read-only verifier, and deploy to Cloudflare Pages.

approvalGates.label: Live adapter gate
approvalGates.requiredBefore: Any GitHub, Discord, GJC, Hermes, or Kanban live API integration

sourceStates.details: The read model is committed with the app; no live API calls are required.

realSource.redaction: Only intentionally curated work-state fields are committed.

title: Rotate exposed Cloudflare tokens
statusReason: The Pages and Access tokens work and are stored in BWS, but tokens were pasted through chat and should be rotated for clean operational accounting.
blocker: Chris must create replacement tokens or approve reuse of the current exposed tokens.
nextAction: Create fresh Cloudflare Pages/Access tokens, update BWS, then revoke the exposed ones.

residueState.summary: Exposed token lineage remains until rotation

sourceStates.details: The current tokens were verified active and stored, but the chat exposure is operational residue.

conflicts.summary: Security cleanup remains open even though deployment works.

realSource.allowlistedPath: BWS hermes project key names only

title: Live source adapters
statusReason: GitHub/GJC/Hermes/Discord/Kanban adapters are intentionally deferred until the static read model proves the UI and accounting shape.
nextAction: Pick one first read-only adapter after the JSON board is accepted.

approvalGates.label: Adapter scope
approvalGates.requiredBefore: Any live API integration or background sync

sourceStates.details: v1 should not become a deep integration or control plane.

title: GitHub Pages residue removed
statusReason: GitHub Pages workflow and CNAME were removed, the GitHub Pages API returns 404, and the repo homepage points to the Cloudflare-protected domain.

sourceStates.details: Workflow and CNAME are absent on remote main.

realSource.redaction: Only commit IDs and API state are rendered.

title: Control plane
statusReason: Dispatch, pause, resume, mark-done, and status mutation are intentionally outside the read-only proof until the visibility layer is trusted.
nextAction: Do not design controls until read-only information hierarchy is accepted.

approvalGates.label: Control-plane approval
approvalGates.requiredBefore: Any UI or API that writes task/executor state

sourceStates.details: Read-only visibility proof remains the current product boundary.
